slides.speaker: Maggie
slides.title: Why Symphony, Why Now
slides.message: Teams are fragmented across tools and AI calls. Symphony turns scattered AI interactions into one coordinated operating layer.

slides.speaker: Ray
slides.title: Human First Direction
slides.message: This is built from the individual outward. We remove dependency traps and keep people in control of their own voice and data.

slides.speaker: Maggie
slides.title: Accessibility Impact
slides.message: EyeSpeak workflows help nonverbal users communicate with confidence, while caregivers and educators can observe the same context in real time.

slides.speaker: Sally Deal Strategist
slides.title: Pilot Structure
slides.message: We propose a 30-day pilot with measurable outcomes: communication velocity, retrieval efficiency, and decision cycle time. {{cohost}} will own weekly KPI review and stakeholder updates.

slides.speaker: Mary Social Media Strategist
slides.title: Public Narrative
slides.message: The story is practical hope: communication access, local workforce pathways, and reliable AI infrastructure people can trust. {{cohost}} drives channel activation for this narrative.

slides.speaker: Maggie
slides.title: The Ask
slides.message: Approve a 20-minute live demo and a 30-day Ohio pilot. We will deliver clear metrics, transparent governance, and an expansion plan.
